title: Pumpkin Overlay - Frame
description: Replaces the Pumpkin Overlay with a Orange Border
body:
Replaces your Pumpkin Overlay with a Orange Frame!

![Image showing the gui border from pumpkin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e091295ca0b884152bdb8551f7108ebda33f61ba.png)

Known **Bugs**:
> Small Bugs:
- > Version _1.21.0–1.21.1:_ The resource pack **icon** shows a thick orange border instead of gradually becoming transparent.
